metadata.description: Architecture plugins that extend what Claude Code can see, map, and build

plugins.name: riviere-architect
plugins.description: Document and capture existing software architecture — components, data flows, decisions, and diagrams

plugins.name: waf-analysis
plugins.description: AWS Well-Architected Framework best practices for architecture reviews

plugins.name: archimedes
plugins.description: AI-assisted architecture intelligence platform for software modernization — deterministic (ast-grep), semantic (ColGREP/qmd), and agentic (osgrep/Serena) analysis layers connected by a persistent SQLite tag store

plugins.name: themis
plugins.description: AWS Well-Architected Framework best practices for architecture reviews

plugins.name: daedalus
plugins.description: Define target architectures and modernize legacy software — migration strategies, technical debt analysis, and refactoring roadmaps
